security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
